title: Mob Mind Control
description: A Minecraft Fabric mod that lets you take control over any mob along with their abilities.
body:
# Mob Mind Control
A Minecraft Fabric mod that lets you take control over any mob along with their abilities.

Consider [joining my discord](https://discord.gg/DKzPpHpa) for feedback, or if you enjoy this mod :)


# CHEATS ENABLED
**/mobcontrol** to enter **Mob Control Mode** as a spectator

**G** to control a mob

**H** to stop controlling a mob

**R** to use a mob's special ability

# Showcase
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/JW9lYlyO/images/33b039f98df45d92e0f469b1da7bc4164bc02ce6_350.webp)
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/JW9lYlyO/images/1d801567f23d09041685b0cf731103af1f9ebebb_350.webp)
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/JW9lYlyO/images/4fbaf5dcba27fd6d908b96d6711894b4f47adb08_350.webp)
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/JW9lYlyO/images/cb9d60311bab8bf9398be686b66d24a45f1af2e4_350.webp)

# Features
- First person mob arm rendering
  
- Mob specific mechanics (spider climbing, flying, enderman teleportation)
  
- Proper animation states (Pillager crossbow charging, Ghast shooting animation)
  
- Animation syncing for bows, crossbows, skeleton attacking poses
  
- Special abilities for 10+ mob types (Enderman, Wither, Blaze, Ghast, Creeper, Witch, Evoker, etc.)
  
- Multiplayer Ready with proper packet synchronization
  
- Inventory management per mob
  
- Hotbar slot persistence when switching mobs
  
- Health/hunger syncing
  
- Equipment mirroring between player and mob

# SURVIVAL GUIDE
When you're possessing a mob, ensure to keep your body in a safe spot!

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/JW9lYlyO/images/6d4afcd6235704dda5d313543093ee58388805e4_350.webp)

Crafting recipe:

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/JW9lYlyO/images/6de3afb058920eba2513c7627735708c0127aec1_350.webp)

Possession Dust can be obtained by mining Possession Ore:

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/JW9lYlyO/images/2adbbccda2d7d0767cfca5bc84ff4a10797642b0_350.webp)

A mob's soul has a 10% chance of dropping:

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/JW9lYlyO/images/2b8b1e98418f8c592b37b73ddf42eb94be4a7bfe_350.webp)
